text:
Chooses Clothes Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how important it is that they choose the clothes that they wear while they are a resident in the current facility. -=Not assessed/no information
1=Very important
2=Somewhat important
3=Not very important
4=Not important at all
5=Important, but can't do or no choice
9=No response or non-responsive
^=Blank (skip pattern)
180 F0400B_CARE_PRSNL_ITM_CD F0400B_CARE_PRSNL_ITM_CD F0400B Interview for Daily Preferences: Care Personal
